name: Chipotle-Tangerine Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 1 3/4 cups fresh tangerine juice (or fresh orange juice)
2 teaspoons grated tangerine or orange zest
1 1/2 teaspoons chopped fresh oregano (or 1/2 teaspoon dried oregano)
1 teaspoon toasted and ground cumin seed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan over moderate heat, reduce the tangerine juice by half.
2. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
3. In the jar of a blender, combine the cooled reduced juice with the remaining ingredients. Season to taste with salt.
4. Blend on high speed for about 1 minute or until the vinaigrette is smooth.
5. The recipe yields approximately 2 cups. Store the vinaigrette in an airtight container in the refrigerator up to 2 weeks.
